ui.per_site_month_monthly: Per site, per month, billed monthly
ui.per_site_month_yearly: Per site, per month, billed annually
ui.per_user_month_monthly: Per user, per month, billed monthly
ui.per_user_month_yearly: Per user, per month, billed annually

index.canvas_desc: An infinite space to research, brainstorm, diagram, and lay out your ideas. Canvas is a limitless playground for your mind. Learn more.
index.collaboration_desc: Work with your team on shared files without compromising your private data.
index.customization_desc: Control the look and feel of your site with themes, custom domains, password protection, and more.
index.developer_docs_desc: Learn how to build your own Obsidian plugins and themes, using our open API and documentation.
index.discussion_forum_desc: Post feature requests, report bugs, and explore in-depth discussions about knowledge management.
index.explore_help_desc: Explore the Obsidian Help site, powered by Obsidian Publish.
index.fine_grained_control_desc: Decide which files and preferences you want to sync to which devices.
index.graph_desc: Visualize the relationships between your notes. Find hidden patterns in your thinking through a visually engaging and interactive graph.
index.hero_subtitle_desc: The free and flexible app for your private thoughts.
index.join_discord_desc: Get help, ask questions, meet other Obsidian users, and learn about their setup.
index.knowledge_desc: Obsidian uses open file formats, so you're never locked in. You own your data for the long term.
index.links_desc: Create connections between your notes. Link anything and everything — ideas, people, places, books, and beyond. Invent your own personal Wikipedia.
index.meta_desc: The free and flexible app for your private thoughts.
index.mind_desc: With thousands of plugins and themes, you can shape Obsidian to fit your way of thinking.
index.optimized_performance_desc: Obsidian Publish sites are fast, mobile-friendly, and optimized for SEO, no configuration required.
index.plugins_desc: Build your ideal thinking space. With thousands of plugins and our open API, it's easy to tailor Obsidian to fit your personal workflow. Learn more.
index.publish_instantly_desc: Turn your notes into an online wiki, knowledge base, documentation, or digital garden. Learn more.
index.seamless_editing_desc: Publish your notes instantly from the Obsidian app, and make it easy for readers to explore your web of ideas.
index.spark_ideas_desc: From personal notes to journaling, knowledge bases, and project management, Obsidian gives you the tools to come up with ideas and organize them.
index.sync_securely_desc: Access your notes on any device, secured with end-to-end encryption. Learn more.
index.thoughts_desc: Obsidian stores notes privately on your device, so you can access them quickly, even offline. No one else can read them, not even us.
index.version_history_desc: Version history. Easily track changes between revisions, with one year of version history for every note.

download.meta_desc: Obsidian is available on all major platforms. Download Obsidian for iOS, Android, macOS, Windows and Linux.

pricing.addons_desc: Optional add-on services make it easy to sync and publish your notes.
pricing.bulk_desc: For bulk purchases and other inquiries, contact us at support@obsidian.md
pricing.faq_a_catalyst: By becoming a Catalyst member, you'll receive early access to beta versions of Obsidian, as well as special badges within the community. Catalyst plays a vital role in helping Obsidian remain 100% user-supported, free from investor influence that could compromise our values.
pricing.faq_a_commercial: No. You are not required to pay for a commercial license, however if you are using Obsidian for work in an organization we encourage you to purchase a commercial license to keep Obsidian independent and 100% user-supported. Learn more.
pricing.faq_a_data_1: Obsidian is a private and secure space for your thoughts. You can use our apps without sharing any personal information, and your data is stored locally on your device, making it inaccessible to us. Additionally, our apps do not collect telemetry data, and we never sell user data.
pricing.faq_a_data_2: If you choose to use Obsidian Sync, your data is secured with AES‑256 end-to-end encryption, preventing us from reading it. Learn more.
pricing.faq_a_discount: Yes, we do! Students, faculty members, and nonprofit employees are eligible for a 40% discount on Obsidian Sync and Publish. We do not offer any other discounts or promotions. Learn more.
pricing.faq_a_gift: Yes! You can purchase Obsidian Credit for friends, family, and coworkers. This credit can be used to pay for any Obsidian license or service. To get started, create an account and buy credit. You can then send it to the recipient via email or a shareable link. Learn more.
pricing.faq_a_refund: We offer full refunds within 7 days of purchase with no questions asked for Obsidian Sync and Publish. However, please note that Catalyst licenses, Commercial licenses, and Obsidian Credit are non-refundable. Learn more.
pricing.faq_q_catalyst: What benefits does the Catalyst license grant?
pricing.faq_q_commercial: Do I have to pay for commercial use?
pricing.faq_q_data: Do you store, access, or process user data?
pricing.faq_q_discount: Do you offer discounts for education, nonprofits, or other groups?
pricing.faq_q_gift: Can I buy Obsidian add-ons or licenses for someone else?
pricing.more_questions_desc: More questions? Visit our Help site
pricing.user_supported_desc: Optional licenses help support the independent development of Obsidian.

sync.collaborate_desc: Invite your team to a shared Obsidian vault. Notes are updated in real-time across your team's devices without compromising the privacy of your company data.
sync.cross_platform_desc: Obsidian is available on all major platforms, so you can sync notes to any device. Seamlessly work across Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and even headless on a server.
sync.e2e_desc: Your data is automatically secured using AES‑256, the strongest encryption standard. With Obsidian Sync you're always in total control of your notes. Learn more.
sync.features_desc: Obsidian Sync works in the background to keep your notes synchronized effortlessly and privately.
sync.file_recovery_desc: File recovery. Restore deleted files, and get granular details on sync activities.
sync.fine_grained_desc: Obsidian Sync lets you decide which files and preferences you want to sync to which devices.
sync.hero:
All your notes,
on all your devices.
sync.hero_desc: The simple and secure way to sync your notes across any device and OS.
sync.meta_desc: Obsidian Sync is the simple and secure way to synchronize your Obsidian notes across any device and OS.
sync.offline_desc: Obsidian is designed to work even without an internet connection. When you're flying or in a remote location, you still have access to your files. When you're back online Sync merges changes for you.
sync.pricing_desc: Easily and securely sync your notes across all your devices. If you're not satisfied, get a refund within 7 days, no questions asked.
sync.selective_sync_desc: Selective sync. Images, audio, video and PDFs can all be toggled to reduce data transfer.
sync.take_control_desc: Set up Obsidian Sync in just a few minutes.
sync.vault_settings_desc: Sync your hotkeys, file and editor preferences, or individually set them per device.
sync.version_history_desc: Obsidian Sync gives you version history for every note, so you can go back to see how the content changed. It's easy to see the differences between revisions.

publish.accessible_desc: Out of the box, Obsidian Publish has a perfect 100% Lighthouse accessibility score. It's our priority to make your content accessible for all visitors.
publish.analytics_desc: Obsidian Publish is private by default, but it's easy to track visits to your site if you choose to. Embed Google Analytics or privacy-friendly tools such as Plausible and Fathom.
publish.backlinks_desc: Backlinks. Automatically list links to pages that reference the current page you are on.
publish.collaborate_desc: Invite your team to collaboratively create and maintain your Publish site.
publish.custom_domain_desc: Custom domain. Point your domain name to Obsidian Publish for a more branded experience.
publish.customization_desc: Obsidian Publish gives you control over the look and feel of your site. It's easy to create a unique and branded design.
publish.edit_markdown_desc: Blazing fast text editing built on the simplicity and reliability of Markdown.
publish.explore_sites_desc: Explore Publish sites by the Obsidian community
publish.features_desc: Obsidian Publish brings your connected notes online. Unique features help readers explore your web of ideas.
publish.graph_view_desc: Visually explore the connections between the pages on your site.
publish.hero: Give your knowledge a home on the web.
publish.hero_desc: The easiest way to publish your wiki, knowledge base, documentation, or digital garden.
publish.hosting: Hosting for your site up to 4GB
publish.hover_previews_desc: Hover previews. Display a popover preview of the linked page when you hover over it, like Wikipedia.
publish.launch_desc: Create a Publish site from your notes in just a few minutes.
publish.meta_desc: Obsidian Publish is the easiest way to publish your wiki, knowledge base, documentation, or digital garden.
publish.mobile_friendly_desc: Visitors on mobile devices are treated as first-class citizens, with an experience that's as intuitive and powerful as it is on the desktop. You can also edit and publish your site from the Obsidian mobile app.
publish.nonlinear: The publishing platform for non-linear thinkers
publish.password_desc: Password protection. Restrict access to your site with the ability to manage multiple passwords.
publish.performance_desc: Speed and accessibility are built into every Obsidian Publish site. No configuration required.
publish.pricing_desc: Host your Obsidian Publish site for one all-inclusive price. If you're not satisfied, get a refund within 7 days, no questions asked.
publish.publish_natively_desc: Make your changes public in just a few taps, even from your mobile devices.
publish.seamless_desc: Publish is built into Obsidian so you can write, collaborate, and publish seamlessly.
publish.seo_desc: Your Publish site is automatically optimized for search engines and social sharing cards. You can even customize metadata with descriptions, slugs, and images, on a page-by-page level.
publish.stacked_pages_desc: Stacked pages. Make links open in horizontal panes that you can browse like a stack of pages on a desk.
publish.themes_desc: Themes. The look of your Obsidian Publish site can be fully customized with CSS and Javascript.

canvas.community_demos_desc: Explore how members of the Obsidian community are using Canvas for the personal life and at work.
canvas.extensible_1_desc: Like everything else in Obsidian, Canvas is extensible and designed to be durable. Our API makes it easy to create plugins that add new capabilities to Canvas.
canvas.extensible_2_desc: Your Canvas files are stored locally using the open JSON Canvas file format that we designed to work with other tools. Apps, scripts, and plugins can easily enhance Canvas by adding or modifying cards and connections.
canvas.flexible_desc: Canvas is packed with functionality. This collection of tips will help you discover how you can use Canvas to its fullest.
canvas.hero_desc: Infinite space to research, brainstorm, diagram, and lay out your ideas. Canvas comes free with Obsidian.
canvas.meta_desc: Obsidian Canvas gives you infinite space to research, brainstorm, diagram, and lay out your ideas.
canvas.new_way_1_desc: Effortlessly add existing notes and media from your vault, and edit them within a Canvas view.
canvas.new_way_2_desc: Canvas views can be embedded in notes, and even nested within another Canvas.
canvas.playground_1_desc: Canvas allows you to organize notes visually — an infinite space to research, brainstorm, diagram and lay out your ideas.
canvas.playground_2_desc: Embed your notes alongside images, PDFs, videos, audio, and even fully interactive web pages.

mobile.feel_at_home_1_desc: Obsidian Mobile brings the power of our desktop app to your mobile devices.
mobile.feel_at_home_2_desc: Tabs, Command Palette, plugins, custom hotkeys — everything that makes Obsidian great is here. Stay productive without another learning curve.
mobile.hero_desc: Obsidian Mobile is your second brain on the go. Available for free on iOS and Android.
mobile.meta_desc: Obsidian Mobile brings the power of our desktop app to your mobile devices.
mobile.small_mighty_desc: Obsidian's best features work out of the box. Core plugins, including graph view, work the same. Even better, community plugins are just a few taps away to supercharge your workflow.
mobile.speed_1_desc: Obsidian Mobile is blazing fast, so you can jot things down before you forget them.
mobile.speed_2_desc: With the customizable toolbar and touch-friendly gestures, zip around your second brain with ease.

clipper.auto_templates_desc: Set up rules to automatically apply the right template based on the website you're clipping from.
clipper.capture_desc: Templates allow you to customize how web pages are saved to your vault.
clipper.capture_title: Easily capture pages and metadata to durable files you can read offline.
clipper.clip_desc: your highlights to Obsidian in one click.
clipper.extract_desc: Capture any data from the page: meta tags, Schema.org variables, and even element selectors.
clipper.features_desc: Web Clipper is free, open source, and packed with useful features that make your favorite browser a sharper tool.
clipper.features_heading: Bring the web to your personal knowledge base.
clipper.hero_desc: Highlight and capture web pages in your favorite browser. Save anything and everything with just one click.
clipper.highlight_desc: Easily highlight important passages you want to save to Obsidian. Your highlights are always visible, so you can revisit them when you return to a page.
clipper.hotkeys_desc: Speed up your workflow with keyboard shortcuts to quickly add content to your vault.
clipper.manipulate_desc: Powerful templating features allow you to modify page data before it's saved to your vault.
clipper.meta_desc: Highlight and capture web pages in your favorite browser. Save anything and everything with just one click.
clipper.no_lockin_desc: Your clips are saved to durable Markdown files. All your highlights and settings are exportable to JSON.
clipper.private_desc: All your clipped content is stored locally in your Obsidian vault. Your thoughts are yours.

plugins.hero_desc: Explore Obsidian plugins made by the community.
plugins.meta_desc: With thousands of plugins and our open API, it's easy to tailor Obsidian to fit your personal workflow.

community.developers_desc: Learn how to build your own Obsidian plugins and themes using our open API and documentation.
community.discord_desc: Get help, ask questions, and get to know other Obsidian users and their setup!
community.forum_desc: Post feature requests, report bugs, and have in-depth discussions about knowledge management.
community.merch_desc: Official Obsidian apparel and accessories for analog connections. Worldwide shipping.
community.meta_desc: Join the community where you can meet Obsidian users, ask questions, report bugs, post feature requests, and more.

about.durable_desc: We believe that your data should be future-proof and easily accessible, no matter where you are. That's why we use simple, open file formats that prevent lock-in and ensure that your data can be preserved for generations to come.
about.independent_desc: We believe in staying true to these principles. That's why we are 100% supported by our users, not investors.
about.malleable_desc: We believe that tools should adapt to your way of thinking, not the other way around. That's why we design our tools to be highly customizable and extensible, so you can shape them to your unique needs.
about.manifesto_desc: Our guiding principles are set in stone.
about.meta_desc: Our guiding principles are set in stone: yours, durable, private, malleable, independent.
about.private_desc: We believe that your thoughts and ideas belong to you and deserve complete privacy. That's why your data is stored on your device, inaccessible to us. When you use our online services, your data is protected with end-to-end encryption for maximum security.
about.who_makes_desc: We're a small team focused on helping you think better.
about.yours_desc: We believe that everyone should have the tools to think clearly and organize ideas effectively. That's why our tools are free for all to use.

security.audit_2023_desc: Penetration test and source code audit of Obsidian apps. Covers all existing client code to date. Following this test, the Cure53 team reported that all vulnerabilities have been addressed and the recommendations have been followed.
security.audit_2024_desc: Penetration test and source code audit of Obsidian apps. Covers all client code, with particular attention to hardening the Web viewer plugin ahead of its release. Following this test, the Cure53 team reported that all vulnerabilities have been addressed and the recommendations have been followed.
security.audits_desc: Regular audits by third-party security firms ensure that Obsidian meets the highest security standards. These reports are shared for transparency, and any vulnerabilities are promptly addressed.
security.e2e_desc: With Obsidian Sync, your data is secured using the strongest encryption standard, AES‑256.
security.hero_desc: Obsidian is designed to be a private and secure space for your thoughts. Here's how we protect your data.
security.meta_desc: Obsidian is designed to be a private and secure space for your thoughts.
security.private_desc: Your data is saved locally on your device. No account is required, no telemetry data is collected.
security.transparency_desc: Obsidian is built on open formats, trusted encryption algorithms, and independently audited code.

enterprise.hero: Meet the teams that trust Obsidian.
enterprise.hero_desc: Organizations that demand the highest security trust Obsidian. Their teams rely on Obsidian to think more effectively and keep total ownership over private data.
enterprise.meta_desc: Organizations that demand the highest security trust Obsidian. Their teams rely on Obsidian to think more effectively and keep total ownership over private data.
enterprise.meta_title: Meet the teams that trust Obsidian
enterprise.show_support_desc:
Obsidian is 100% user-supported.
Join the movement. Support independent software.
enterprise.supporting_orgs_desc: More than 10,000 organizations help keep Obsidian 100% user-supported. Join them with the purchase of a commercial license.

brand.contact_us_desc: The Obsidian name, logo and app icon are trademarks. You are free to customize the Obsidian app icon for your personal use. If you want to use Obsidian assets for commercial purposes, please contact us.
brand.guidelines_desc: The Obsidian logo is inspired by its namesake, the volcanic rock which has been used since the dawn of humanity to make arrowheads, scrapers, knives, and other tools. Learn more.
brand.hero_desc: Download the Obsidian logo and brand assets.
brand.icon_desc: For variations on the app icon, download the asset files linked above.
brand.logo_lockup_desc: For most applications, the lockup should be displayed as follows, using the purple mark and black or white text. For single color applications, the entire logomark should be either black or white.
brand.meta_desc: Download the Obsidian logo and brand assets.
brand.no_edit_desc: Please do not edit, change, distort, recolor, or reconfigure the Obsidian logo.

roadmap.detail_desc: For more detail about individual releases see the Changelog. Have a feature request? Visit the official forum.
roadmap.subtitle_desc: We're chipping away at improvements to Obsidian.
